summary: The diff shows Hero.tsx was modified, but the img src was set to '/assets/0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png' (the raw uploaded filename) rather than '/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png' as required. There is also no evidence that the uploaded PNG was saved as 'frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png'. The container lacks light background classes (uses bg-transparent), which satisfies that AC. The mix-blend-mode: screen approach addresses the checkerboard artifact requirement partially, but the core asset path and src requirements are not met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded image (0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png) as the new DJ Fizz logo static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png, replacing the existing file.
missing_requirements.reason: No file was added or modified at frontend/public/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png. The diff shows 0 added files and no changes to the assets directory.

missing_requirements.requirement: The element in Hero.tsx must have its src set to /assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png.
missing_requirements.reason: The img src in Hero.tsx is set to '/assets/0E4EB4A7-858B-4D8C-9F78-10EFB5808419.png' (the raw uploaded filename), not '/assets/generated/dj-fizz-logo.png' as specified in the requirement and acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: The img element uses mixBlendMode: 'screen' to blend the logo against the dark background, which was not requested in the build requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for no light background classes and transparent background rendering; mix-blend-mode: screen is an unrequested styling technique that alters how the image composites with the background.
